title: camonea umbellata
intro: Camonea umbellata, also known as the Camomile, is a daisy-like perennial plant belonging to the daisy family, characterized by its small white flowers and apple-like fragrance. The medicinal properties of Camomile are attributed to its essential oils, which contain compounds such as apigenin and linalool, known for their anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Camomile include reducing anxiety and insomnia, soothing digestive issues and menstrual cramps, and promoting relaxation and better sleep quality. Camomile can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, essential oils, and topical creams, which can be used to relieve stress and promote overall well-being.
